title: Grow Zephyr simulator fidelity
description: Build faithful enough Renode/native simulation backends for board/application combinations that the boot audit could not honestly execute. Model only behavior needed by documented target hardware and retain explicit boundaries where physical validation remains required.
acceptance_criteria: Each declared simulator backend loads canonical firmware, reaches app-specific late runtime markers, and produces an independent protocol/radio effect; model limitations are documented and never presented as physical RF/electrical proof.
